series_metadata.series_description: FORMS USED BY A PERSON/ORGANIZATION TO ENTER INTO CONTRACT WITH AN AGENCY TO REQUEST PAYMENT FOR SERVICES RENDERED OR TO AMEND CONTRACT. MAY INCLUDE ATTENDANCE FORMS, CORRESPONDENCE, ETC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: ONE YEAR IN OFFICE AND THREE YEARS IN STATE RECORD CENTER. PROVIDED AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED
